sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tang in, siangtho tak zang in;
Ka khut mang sak, sem sak in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka phei phung hong zang in
Nang a’ ding ngal hatsak in;
Ka aw zong Nang tang inla,
Ngaih tak Na min phatsak in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka kam ka muk hong zang in,
Ka sum ka paai tang khin in,
Neu kha beek hong it kei ning,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nangmah in hong uk ta in,
Nangmah in hong uk ta in.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Na khe mai ah hong sung ning;
Ka pumpi in hong tang in,
Nang aa bek hi khin den
Nang aa bek hi khin den ning.
